name: Lavendmoss
personality: Lavendmoss wears its halo and waits for the CI to green with ◉ eyes that emit something between serenity and mild accusation — it has logged every flaky test failure this month, and will wait for you to fix them. Actually digging into why the tests are flaky is a task for capybaras with more interest in debugging.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
